sheetDescription: Adjust the appearance and layout to suit your preferences.
resetAria: Reset all settings to default values

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose between system preference, light mode, or dark mode

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.description: Choose between inset, floating, or standard sidebar layout

layout.title: Layout
layout.description: Choose between default expanded, compact icon-only, or full layout mode

direction.title: Direction
direction.description: Choose between left-to-right or right-to-left site direction
